faq.question: What is an aura?
faq.answer: In spiritual traditions, an aura is an energy field surrounding the body. Different colors are believed to reflect personality, emotional state, and spiritual development. While not scientifically validated, aura reading is a popular self-reflection tool.

faq.question: What does each aura color mean?
faq.answer: Red: passionate, strong, grounded. Orange: creative, adventurous. Yellow: optimistic, intellectual. Green: healing, nurturing. Blue: calm, communicative. Indigo: intuitive, wise. Violet: spiritual, visionary. White: pure, transcendent.

faq.question: Can your aura color change?
faq.answer: Yes. Aura colors are believed to shift based on emotional state, health, spiritual growth, and life circumstances. Your core aura color tends to remain stable, but secondary colors fluctuate regularly.

faq.question: Is the Aura Color Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Aura Color Calculator?
sections.body: The Aura Color Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your dominant trait, current stress level, social energy, you get instant results including primary aura color, secondary aura color, strongest chakra. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting primary aura color right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your dominant trait and need to find the right primary aura color. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Dominant Trait
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your dominant trait — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: current stress level, social energy, birth month. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your primary aura color, secondary aura color, strongest chakra. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your dominant trait before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
